note: Qualitative anchors from trade coverage. Hashtag view-count tracking is the next signal to automate (roadmap).

cards.p: Influencer 'stuffing parties' and limited products sell fast; older buyers are not discount-driven and make multiple purchases.
Points + early access to limited drops make loyalty feel like a collector's club, not a rewards card.
Strong collector demand for Pokémon, Star Wars, The Nightmare Before Christmas, and game tie-ins (Mario & Luigi).
'Build-A-Bear Tycoon' on Roblox has surpassed 24M visits since 2022 — a always-on engagement channel with under-13 and teen audiences.
